{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Redmoon Hall's cloud fortress
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] possesses a cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
